text:
Created attachment 259907
0.9.3 bug fixes, version 2

Stefan, Does this do what you need?
Also, don't forget Kyle's fix in bug #280418.

I think of this as creating 0.9.4, but use whatever you like.  /usr/bin/calendar itself doesn't have the 0.9.3 version number in it anywhere -- it's only the port that has that number.
